sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Bank of Zambia (Amendment) Short title
sections.text:
Act, 2013, and shall be read as one with the Bank of Zambia Act, Cap. 360
in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 1.00 each.

providers
Insertion of 4. The principal Act is amended by the insertion, immediately
new section after section fifty-six, of the following new section:
56A
General 56A. A person who commits an offence under this Act for
penalty which no penalty is specifically provided is liable, upon
conviction, to a fine not exceeding three million penalty units
or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding five years, or to
both.
